front.title: The JMAPACCESS Extension for IMAP
front.workgroup: Email mailstore and eXtensions To Revise or Amend

abstract.t: This document defines an IMAP extension to let clients know that the messages in this IMAP server are also available via the JSON Meta Application Protocol (JMAP), and how. It is intended for clients that want to migrate gradually to JMAP or use JMAP extensions within an IMAP client.
